<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Attributes; use Attribute; #[Attribute(Attribute::IS_REPEATABLE | Attribute::TARGET_FUNCTION | Attribute::TARGET_METHOD | Attribute::TARGET_CLASS)] class ResponseFromTransformer { public function __construct( public string $name, public ?string $model = null, public int $status = 200, public ?string $description = '', /* Mark if this should be used as a collection. Only needed if not using a CollectionTransformer. */ public bool $collection = false, public array $factoryStates = [], public array $with = [], public ?string $resourceKey = null, /* Format: [adapter, numberPerPage]. Example: [SomePaginator::class, 10] */ public array $paginate = [], ) { } }
